## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on GrowthxLabs project updates, focusing on UI design and content management system access.](https://fathom.video/share/zdhbwkmV6Lns--ofztsWkts7or7wac7J?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New gallery and tool page designs presented; option 2 for tool pages preferred](https://fathom.video/share/zdhbwkmV6Lns--ofztsWkts7or7wac7J?tab=summary&timestamp=32.0)
  - [CMS access issues for Marcel need resolution; Patricio to resend Strapi invite](https://fathom.video/share/zdhbwkmV6Lns--ofztsWkts7or7wac7J?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)
  - [Video for hero section delayed; placeholder to be used for Tuesday deadline](https://fathom.video/share/zdhbwkmV6Lns--ofztsWkts7or7wac7J?tab=summary&timestamp=667.0)
  - [Next week's meeting schedule adjusted due to Marcel's travel plans](https://fathom.video/share/zdhbwkmV6Lns--ofztsWkts7or7wac7J?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

## Topics

### UI Design Updates

  - [Gallery design: Simple layout with title, subheading, search bar, and tool cards](https://fathom.video/share/zdhbwkmV6Lns--ofztsWkts7or7wac7J?tab=summary&timestamp=32.0)
  - [Tool page designs: Two options presented](https://fathom.video/share/zdhbwkmV6Lns--ofztsWkts7or7wac7J?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
      - [Option 1: Similar to current article layout (title, subheading, video, form, info)](https://fathom.video/share/zdhbwkmV6Lns--ofztsWkts7or7wac7J?tab=summary&timestamp=107.0)
      - [Option 2: Preferred; hero section, form, info, banner, tools section](https://fathom.video/share/zdhbwkmV6Lns--ofztsWkts7or7wac7J?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
  - [Feedback:](https://fathom.video/share/zdhbwkmV6Lns--ofztsWkts7or7wac7J?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
      - [FAQs should be part of main content, not after other tools](https://fathom.video/share/zdhbwkmV6Lns--ofztsWkts7or7wac7J?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
      - [Embed section should stand out more (e.g., frame or styled differently)](https://fathom.video/share/zdhbwkmV6Lns--ofztsWkts7or7wac7J?tab=summary&timestamp=236.0)
      - [Quotes/testimonials section may not be necessary](https://fathom.video/share/zdhbwkmV6Lns--ofztsWkts7or7wac7J?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)
      - [FAQ format to be more like Copy AI example (side-by-side or expanded text)](https://fathom.video/share/zdhbwkmV6Lns--ofztsWkts7or7wac7J?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [Gallery page:](https://fathom.video/share/zdhbwkmV6Lns--ofztsWkts7or7wac7J?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
      - [Implement infinite scrolling instead of pagination](https://fathom.video/share/zdhbwkmV6Lns--ofztsWkts7or7wac7J?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
      - [Group all tools together, followed by CTA before footer](https://fathom.video/share/zdhbwkmV6Lns--ofztsWkts7or7wac7J?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
